description: Security specialist fleet — CVE analyst + code-vulnerability scanner. Both ≤0.5B. Routes by whether the query is about a code snippet (code specialist) or a CVE/advisory (research specialist).

specialists.description: CVE/NVD analyst — CVSS scoring, affected products, patch guidance, MITRE ATT&CK mapping. SmolLM2-360M-Instruct SRD-4 quantized.
Code vulnerability scanner — SAST-style analysis, CWE classification, remediation suggestion. Qwen2.5-Coder-0.5B-Instruct SRD-4 quantized.
